prompt_text:
### Demographics: 56-year-old Asian woman

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 5 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes during urgent care evaluation for fatigue/blurred vision
Current symptoms: Rare nocturnal hypoglycemia (1 episode in 3 months); no DKA/HHS signs

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 3b (30-44)
Heart failure: HFmrEF (NYHA Class III)
ASCVD: History of myocardial infarction; Peripheral artery disease
Simple Steatosis
Body mass index category: Normal
Rheumatoid Arthritis
Recurrent Complicated Urinary Tract Infections
Osteoporosis (on bisphosphonate therapy)
Thyroid nodule (status post lobectomy)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 3b (30-44); HF: HFmrEF (NYHA Class III); ASCVD: History of myocardial infarction; MASLD: Simple Steatosis; BMI Category: Normal
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (maternal grandmother)
- Social history: Never smoker; Alcohol 1-2 drinks/week

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 500mg twice daily; Semaglutide 1mg once weekly; Methotrexate (15 mg weekly), Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Lisinopril (10 mg daily), Finerenone (10 mg daily), Nitrofurantoin (100 mg twice daily for prophylaxis), Alendronate (70 mg weekly), Calcium Carbonate 500 Mg + Cholecalciferol 1000 Iu (daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 53.7 kg; Height 155.9 cm; BMI 22.1 kg/m²; Blood pressure 123/88 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 9.7%; 9 months ago 9.1%; 6 months ago 8.6%; 3 months ago 8.1%; current 7.0%), FPG (12 months ago 243mg/dL; 9 months ago 227mg/dL; 6 months ago 206mg/dL; 3 months ago 221mg/dL; current 151mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 56.7kg; 9 months ago 53.3kg; 6 months ago 52.8kg; 3 months ago 50.2kg; current 53.7kg), Height (12 months ago 155.9cm; 9 months ago 155.9cm; 6 months ago 155.9cm; 3 months ago 155.9cm; current 155.9cm), BMI (12 months ago 23.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 22.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 22.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 21.0kg/m²; current 22.1kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 123mmHg; 9 months ago 125mmHg; 6 months ago 123mmHg; 3 months ago 126mmHg; current 123mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 86mmHg; 9 months ago 87mmHg; 6 months ago 88mmHg; 3 months ago 85mmHg; current 88mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 48U/L; 9 months ago 44U/L; 6 months ago 49U/L; 3 months ago 43U/L; current 49U/L), AST (12 months ago 41U/L; 9 months ago 31U/L; 6 months ago 36U/L; 3 months ago 34U/L; current 36U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.9mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.9mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.9mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.8mg/dL; current 0.8mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 43mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 45mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 44mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 43mL/min/1.73m²; current 42mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 287mg/g; 9 months ago 298mg/g; 6 months ago 327mg/g; 3 months ago 251mg/g; current 199mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 79mg/dL; 9 months ago 81mg/dL; 6 months ago 80mg/dL; 3 months ago 75mg/dL; current 77mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 58mg/dL; 9 months ago 55mg/dL; 6 months ago 55mg/dL; 3 months ago 56mg/dL; current 57mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 158mg/dL; 9 months ago 158mg/dL; 6 months ago 143mg/dL; 3 months ago 159mg/dL; current 151mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 12.0g/dL; 9 months ago 11.2g/dL; 6 months ago 11.9g/dL; 3 months ago 12.0g/dL; current 11.5g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide 1.01 ng/mL (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Excellent adherence (estimated ≥90%); SMBG 4-5 times/week; diet/exercise well controlled.
Financial context: Patient has comprehensive insurance with minimal out-of-pocket burden and reports no financial barriers to clinically indicated therapies (budget ≤ KRW 1,000,000/month).
